ThemeSite Home About Blog

Dark/Light Mode Demo

This site has its own dark mode toggle. It starts in light mode and uses both CSS media queries and JavaScript toggling.

☼ Light Mode
Click "Toggle Theme" in the navigation to switch

About This Page

This page tests how the AMOLED Black extension interacts with websites that already have their own dark/light mode implementation. The site uses CSS custom properties that change based on the active theme.

How It Works

The page checks prefers-color-scheme via media query and also provides a manual toggle button. When toggled, a data-theme="dark" attribute is set on the root element.

Interactive Elements
